scripts.sync:build: npm run sync && npm run tauri build
scripts.dev: npm run sync && npm run tauri dev
scripts.ship: npm run sync && npm run tauri build && rm -rf "$HOME/Applications/Studio S.app" && cp -R 'src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Studio S.app' "$HOME/Applications/" && cp -f "$(ls -t src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg | head -1)" "$HOME/Desktop/Studio S Installer.dmg" && echo '✅ Shipped to ~/Applications and updated Desktop installer'
